name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently, and that's completely okay — life gets busy, and we never want dental care to feel like pressure.

If you ever decide to come back for a cleaning or a check-in, here's 20% off on us:

{{coupon.code}}

This code is good for the next 14 days. Use it the next time you book — no strings, no awkward follow-ups.

And if there was something about your last visit that didn't feel right, I'd genuinely love to hear about it. Just reply to this email — a real person reads every one.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick note that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure 🙂

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
